title: Add delete profile and delete content options

requirements.summary: Add a 'Delete Profile' option to the user's profile area that allows an authenticated user to permanently delete their profile, with confirmation dialog, logout, and redirect to feed
acceptanceCriteria: A 'Delete Profile' button is visible to the authenticated user in the profile area.
Clicking 'Delete Profile' opens a confirmation dialog warning the user that the action is irreversible.
Confirming deletion calls the backend to remove the user's profile data.
After successful deletion, the user is logged out and redirected to the feed page.

file_operations.description: Create a new ProfileMenu component that displays the authenticated user's name and includes a 'Delete Profile' button. The component should use the authorization component to verify authentication and fetch the user profile. When the delete button is clicked, show a confirmation dialog using shadcn/ui AlertDialog component warning that the action is irreversible. Upon confirmation, call the backend deleteCallerUserProfile method, then trigger logout via useInternetIdentity and redirect to the feed page using TanStack Router navigation.

Wire the new ProfileMenu component into the Layout header next to the LoginButton. The ProfileMenu should only render when the user is authenticated (identity exists). Position it in the header navigation area so users can easily access their profile and delete option.

Add a new useMutation hook for deleting the caller's profile. The mutation should call actor.deleteCallerUserProfile() and invalidate the 'currentUserProfile' query key on success to ensure any cached profile data is cleared.

requirements.summary: Add an optional 'Delete Content' button to each content item owned by the authenticated user, with confirmation dialog and UI removal after deletion
acceptanceCriteria: A 'Delete Content' button is rendered on content cards and/or the content detail page only when the authenticated user is the content owner.
Clicking 'Delete Content' opens a confirmation dialog before any deletion occurs.
Confirming deletion calls the backend to permanently remove the content item.
After successful deletion, the content is removed from the feed and any related UI (e.g., queue, detail page) without requiring a full page reload.

file_operations.description: Add a 'Delete Content' button that only renders when the authenticated user's Principal matches the content's uploader Principal. Use the authorization component to access the current user's identity and compare it with content.uploader. The delete button should open a confirmation dialog using shadcn/ui AlertDialog, warning that deletion is permanent. On confirmation, call the deleteContent mutation and optimistically remove the content card from the UI.

Add a 'Delete Content' button to the content detail page that only renders when the authenticated user is the content owner. Use the authorization component to verify ownership by comparing the user's Principal with content.uploader. When clicked, show a confirmation dialog using shadcn/ui AlertDialog. On confirmation, call the deleteContent mutation, and on success, navigate back to the feed page using TanStack Router.

Add a new useMutation hook for deleting content. The mutation should accept a contentId parameter, call actor.deleteContent(contentId), and on success invalidate all content-related query keys including feed queries, queue queries, and specific content detail queries to ensure the deleted content is removed from all cached data.

Create a reusable ConfirmationDialog component using shadcn/ui AlertDialog that accepts props for title, description, confirmLabel, cancelLabel, onConfirm, and onCancel callbacks. This component will be used for both profile and content deletion confirmations to maintain consistency and reduce duplication.
